title.en: The other Eternal Dao realms all agreed.

content.en:
"Good!"

The other Eternal Dao realms all agreed.

This thing is too terrifying, I thought that if I grabbed this vine and didn't refine it, I might not be transformed by the demon seed, but I didn't expect that the Eternal Dao Realm just put it into the void in his body, and he was actually transformed by the demon seed.

It's so weird!

Where would they dare to take him back, otherwise all the Eternal Dao Realms along the way would have to be transformed into demon seeds.

Even the Lord of the Thousand Mountains couldn't bear it, and they were transformed by the demon seed, and they didn't have any certainty, so they were unwilling to take risks.

Rumble!!!!!

Many Eternal Dao Realms struck, and the earth bulged, covering the black vine, and then they used sealing methods one by one to seal it.

Of course, they didn't seal it seriously, and after simply doing this, they left quickly, not daring to stay here at all.

After all, they also suspected that staying near this black vine for a long time would also turn the Eternal Dao Demon Seed into a demon, and that would be the end of it.

Whew!!!

They departed quickly, then hurried through the Eternal Yin Wind Belt in the direction of the Kingdom of the Gods.

However, on the other side, Ye Tian's other replica body rushed to the black vine from the other direction.

He's interested in black vines, which are definitely good things.

Other Eternal Dao Species of the Eternal Dao Realm have flaws and are easy to be demonized, but he is a perfect Eternal Dao Species, and it is impossible for him to be demonized.

So, he wanted to take this black vine and study it.

"After these Eternal Dao Realms go back, inform the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods, maybe the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods knows, in case he is interested, then there is nothing to do with me. "

Thereupon.

He sped up and hurried over.

His speed was much faster than many Eternal Dao Realms, so he must have rushed to the black vines first, and when he took the black vines, those Eternal Dao Realms probably hadn't rushed back to the realm of all gods.

After all, those top country lords also had to reduce their speed to maintain a low speed, so that the weakest Eternal Supreme Dao realm could keep up.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian's duplicate body also passed through the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, easily passed through, and then went straight to the black vines.

Finally, he arrived.

"Found.!"

Ye Tian saw this huge mountain, and then attacked hard.

Thundered!!!

Under attack after attack, the seal of this mountain peak was broken.

After all, it is a temporary seal, so naturally it does not have much defensive power.

After shattering the seal, the vine appeared, Ye Tian grabbed it, put it into the void in his body, and then erased the traces here, leaving no clue.

After doing so, he quickly left.

......

Kingdom of the Gods.

Many Eternal Dao Realms have returned, and they are the first to meet the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods.

"Has the crisis of the Thousand Hills Realm Alliance been resolved?

The Lord of the Gods asked.

"Solved!"

A lord of the nation.

But soon, he said the black vine, "Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods, this time we have encountered a trouble, the reason why the Lord of the Thousand Mountains is a demon seed should have something to do with a black vine, we besieged the Demon Seed of the Lord of the Thousand Mountains, his demon seed aura is getting stronger and stronger, after killing him, a black vine grows from his demon seed." One of us, the Eternal Dao Realm, put it into the void in his body, and after traveling for a distance, he directly turned into a demon. We didn't dare to take it with us, so we sealed it on the way. "

When the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods heard this, he showed a deep interest.

The great kingdom of all gods is the main way.

"Yes!" the lord of the kingdom froze.

The Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods stared at the black vine that had been conjured, and was a little excited: "It turned out to be an evil vine!"

"Lord of the Gods, what is this?"

The lord asked, judging from the reaction of the lord of the gods, it seems to be a good thing!

"The Evil Vine is a strange plant, a special thing that grows in the death zone, it can induce the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, as long as you touch it, or put it into the void in your body, you will be demonized by it, even if it is a half-step beyond the existence of the Eternal Dao Realm, it can't stop it. Only a strong person who truly transcends the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm can touch it without incident. "

"Although the Evil Punishment Vine will induce the transformation of the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, its value is very high, if you refine it, you can use it to fight, and the threat to the Eternal Dao Realm is very terrifying. Of course, for a powerhouse who has transcended the Eternal Dao Realm, the Evil Vine can strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed!"

The great kingdom of all gods is the main way.

"Grow the Eternal Dao Seed?"

They were shocked.

The Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods said with a smile: "If the Eternal Dao Seed is not induced by it to transform into a demon seed, it can naturally be used to let it take root in the Eternal Dao Seed, absorb external energy, and then through the transformation of the evil vines, it will be integrated into the Eternal Dao Seed, so that the Eternal Dao Seed will become stronger and stronger." You should know that if you want to break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, you must let the Eternal Dao Species evolve, and the Evil Vine will help you break through to a higher realm in the Eternal Dao Realm, but you can't withstand the influence of the Evil Vine, so it is only suitable for us to improve our strength. "

"Tell me, where is this thing, after I get it, I will definitely give you a reward!"

They immediately told the location of the evil vine, and after the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods knew about it, he shuttled directly over it.

He's fast, and it won't take long to get there.

"I really envy the lord of the gods and gods, and he has obtained another opportunity, and the opportunity falls in front of us, but we don't have the strength to obtain it!" said a lord of the kingdom secretly.

"There's no way, we don't dare to take this thing for us!" the other lord shook his head helplessly.

Ye Tian was extremely excited, but he didn't show it.

"The Evil Vine can even grow the Eternal Dao Seed !!! (Li's Zhao)"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

After the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules are cultivated into the Eternal Dao Species, they are almost frozen, and it is difficult to improve.

Since he cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed, he has not improved the Eternal Dao Seed even a little, and even thought that he could not improve it!

But now that I know, it's not that there is no way to improve, but it's that the treasures that can be upgraded to the Eternal Dao Seed are too rare.

And now, he has obtained the Evil Punishment Vine, and there is no problem in surpassing the Eternal Dao Realm in the future.

"The evil vines can't be exposed, otherwise fools will know that my Eternal Dao Seed is a perfect Eternal Dao Seed!" Ye Tian said darkly.

He decided.

The replica body that took away the evil vines can't stay in the Alliance of the Kingdom of Gods, so let's just return to the Void Domain.

In this case, it is safer.

Subsequently.

His copy body kept detouring and returning to the Void Realm, so that he wouldn't meet the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods.
